samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal traffic light operation, the east-west (EW) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5 clock cycles of yellow and 10 clock cycles of red. The north-south (NS) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5 clock cycles of yellow and 10 clock cycles of red. When the pedestrian button is pressed, if the remaining EW green time is greater than 10 clocks, force it to be 10 clocks. If the remaining EW green time is less than 10 clocks, do not change the remaining time. The EW and NS lights are paired. When the EW light is green or yellow, the NS light is red. When the EW light is red, the NS light is green.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button input.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum id="s1_red">State 1 red.</enum>
        <enum id="s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</enum>
        <enum id="s3_green">State 3 green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <assign>
                <part id="state"/> == <enum id="idle"/> 
                <part id="state"/> == <enum id="s1_red"/> 
                <part id="state"/> == <enum id="s2_yellow"/> 
                <part id="state"/> == <enum id="s3_green"/> 
            </assign>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always_comb>
            if (<part id="state"/> == <enum id="idle"/> ) begin
                <part id="red"/> <= 0;
                <part id="yellow"/> <= 0;
                <part id="green"/> <= 0;
                <part id="state"/> <= <enum id="s1_red"/> ;
            end
            else if (<part id="state"/> == <enum id="s1_red"/> ) begin
                <part id="red"/> <= 1;
                <part id="yellow"/> <= 0;
                <part id="green"/> <= 0;
                if (<part id="cnt"/> == 3) begin
                    <part id="state"/> <= <enum id="s3_green"/> ;
                end
                else begin
                    <part id="state"/> <= <enum id="s1_red"/> ;
                end
            end
            else if (<part id="state"/> == <enum id="s2_yellow"/> ) begin
                <part id="red"/> <= 0;
                <part id="yellow"/> <= 1;
                <part id="green"/> <= 0;
                if (<part id="cnt"/> == 3) begin
                    <part id="state"/> <= <enum id="s1_red"/> ;
                end
                else begin
                    <part id="state"/> <= <enum id="s2_yellow"/> ;
                end
            end
            else if (<part id="state"/> == <enum id="s3_green"/> ) begin
                <part id="red"/> <= 0;
                <part id="yellow"/> <= 0;
                <part id="green"/> <= 1;
                if (<part id="cnt"/> == 3) begin
                    <part id="state"/> <= <enum id="s2_yellow"/> ;
                end
                else begin
                    <part id="state"/> <= <enum id="s3_green"/> ;
                end
            end
        </always_comb>
        <always_ff posedge id="clk" negedge id="rst_n">
            if (!rst_n) begin
                <part id="cnt"/> <= 10;
            end
            else begin
                if (<part id="pass_request"/> && <part id="green"/>) begin
                    <part id="cnt"/> <= 10;
                end
                else if (!<part id="green"/> && p_green) begin
                    <part id="cnt"/> <= 60;
                end
                else if (!<part id="yellow"/> && p_yellow) begin
                    <part id="cnt"/> <= 5;
                end
                else if (!<part id="red"/> && p_red) begin
                    <part id="cnt"/> <= 10;
                end
                else begin
                    <part id="cnt"/> <= <part id="cnt"/> - 1;
                end
            end
        </always_ff>
        <assign>
            <part id="clock"/> = <part id="cnt"/> ;
        </assign>
        <always_ff posedge id="clk" negedge id="rst_n">
            <part id="p_red"/> <= <part id="red"/> ;
            <part id="p_yellow"/> <= <part id="yellow"/> ;
            <part id="p_green"/> <= <part id="green"/> ;
        </always_ff>
    </implementation>
</module>
